text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yo, word going around is that today's your
birthday. Izzat true?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Yes! It's a huge honor to know that you are aware
of the day of my birth!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast! I didn't even say happy birthday yet!
What're ya jumpin' the gun for?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, I got some tea brewin'. Get your stuff 'n'
follow me!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wha—tea?! You made tea just for me?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
There's nothin' I wouldn't do for my junior! I made
somethin' ridiculously tasty too, so I hope you're
hungry.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I stewed it with lots of carrot, so it's nice and
sweet. Even the fox god would love it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! Eat up as much as ya want! This is
my specially made, ultimate inari sush—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Whoooa! You made cake?! I'm so happy—a cake
handmade by Inari! Ahh, incredible!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh? Now hold on just a second!
